summary: Classified the hydrated PR-inventory shard independently with no shared canonical. No GitHub mutations, merge, close, or fix PR actions are planned because this job disables instant close, merge, and fix lanes. Security-sensitive refs are scoped to route_security; closed refs are kept closed; ordinary open PRs remain open for their existing proof/maintainer-review paths.
